signals.title: Dealers Long Delta — NIFTY
signals.desc: Dealer net delta: +20,434,547 contracts. Dealers will sell into rallies — capping upside. Best to sell CEs near resistance.

signals.title: IV Elevated — NIFTY: 28.0%
signals.desc: ATM IV at 28.0% — options richly priced. Sell premium via iron condors or spreads. Avoid naked option buying.

signals.title: Zero-Gamma Level Close — NIFTY @ ₹22,967
signals.desc: Spot within 0.1% of zero-gamma (22,967). Crossing this level could trigger accelerated moves as dealer hedging flips direction.

signals.title: Fresh Call Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
signals.desc: CE OI at ₹23,000 growing +72% today (169,756 OI). Strong resistance wall forming — sell CE spreads above this level.

signals.title: Short Gamma Regime — NIFTY
signals.desc: Net GEX = -171.1Cr. Dealers SHORT gamma: volatility amplification. Expect larger moves; avoid selling naked options.

signals.title: Dealer Flip Level @ ₹23,025 — NIFTY

signals.title: Fresh Put Writing — NIFTY @ ₹23,000
